name: Device motion based changes to the content can be disabled
description: This rule checks that it is possible to disable any changes to the content of the web page resulting from device motion based events.
applicability_text: This rule applies to an [HTML document][] with an associated [Window object][] that has an [event listener list][] with one or more [event listeners][event listener] for [device orientation events][device orientation] or [device motion events][device motion].
